remarks: Welcome to your new home high above the city on the 8th floor of Fountain Terrace-one of Stamford's most sought-after full-service buildings. Partially furnished for your convenience, this sun-soaked 2-bedroom, 1-bath condo features sweeping views of the city skyline and Long Island Sound from a private balcony, perfect for morning coffee or winding down at sunset. Enjoy an open, airy layout with generous living space and great natural light throughout. Just minutes to Downtown Stamford's restaurants, shops, entertainment, train station, and schools-offering both convenience and lifestyle. Heat, hot water, sewer, trash removal, snow & grounds maintenance, and cooking gas-all covered by the landlord.
